creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
Compilation stops every time at module sd. I suspect changes after 
28 Jul since I have built successfully OOo few days ago on this machine.

ERROR: error 65280 occurred while making 
/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO310_m11/sd/source/ui/app 

Attention: if you build and deliver the above module(s) 
you may prolongue your the build issuing command "build --from sd"

My make.conf

CPUTYPE=core2

.if ${.CURDIR:M*/editors/openoffice.org-3}
LOCALIZED_LANG=pl
WITHOUT_MOZILLA=yes
WITHOUT_GNOME=yes
WITHOUT_CUPS=yes
.endif

How-To-Repeat: cd to editors/openoffice.org-3 and type make or portmaster editors/openoffice.org-3
